name: Rogue Trip
overview: ABC News Correspondent Bob Woodruff and his 28-year-old son Mack Woodruff take viewers on a father-son adventure to some of the world’s most unexpected places – roguish nations and territories mostly known for conflict, but each possessing a unique power to surprise, amaze and inspire.

trailers.title: ROGUE TRIP | Disney+ Trailer | Official Disney UK
